title: CBB Rulebook Volume 4 Digital Financial Advice Module
summary: Applies governance, systems controls, testing, client disclosure, risk management, cybersecurity, and data protection expectations to automated digital financial advice offered by investment business licensees.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Regulates algorithmic robo-advice by investment business licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Personal Data Protection Law No. 30 of 2018 and CBB Rulebook Volume 4
